contract_name: CyberShield Vendor-Risk Trust Decision Record Contract
scope: Guided vendor-risk demo and static deterministic ATDR engine
required_product_doctrine: Framework mapping is not compliance proof.
Vendor risk is the first wedge.

out_of_scope_expected_record.recommended_action: Out of Scope for Current Review

must_not: Do not return Medium confidence for unsupported philosophical, existential, moral, vague, or universal inputs.
Do not treat SOC 2 as automatic vendor approval.
Do not treat framework mapping as compliance proof.
Do not introduce fake numeric trust scores.
Do not claim Google Sheet capture succeeded when endpoint mode is simulated.
static_prototype_limitations: Browser Print / Save PDF is the current PDF path
CRM capture is simulated until REPORT_CAPTURE_ENDPOINT is configured
